# Data Model: Frontend–Backend Integration

**Generated by**: `/speckit.plan`
**Date**: 2026-04-13
**Feature**: [spec.md](./spec.md) | [research.md](./research.md)

---

## Frontend State Model Changes

### Modified: `VideoData`

Adds `jobId` (required) and `thumbnailUrl` (optional) to enable subsequent trim/gif/mp3 API calls from any screen.

```typescript
export interface VideoData {
  /** URL pre-firmada de S3 para reproducir en el <video> player (3600s de validez). */
  videoUrl: string;
  /** Título o descripción del video. Se trunca en UI si supera ~120 caracteres. */
  title: string;
  /** Duración total del video en segundos. */
  durationSeconds: number;
  /** URL original de TikTok ingresada por el usuario. Necesaria para crear nuevos jobs (MP3). */
  sourceUrl: string;
  /** jobId del backend. Necesario para llamadas a /trim, /gif, /mp3. */
  jobId: string;
  /** URL de la miniatura del video. Opcional según disponibilidad en el backend. */
  thumbnailUrl?: string;
}
```

### Modified: `TrimState`

Adds `trimDownloadUrl` (populated after a trim/gif/mp3 operation completes) to keep the download URL as part of app state, avoiding local component state.

```typescript
export interface TrimState {
  screen: "trim";
  videoData: VideoData;
  trimSelection: TrimSelection;
  trimResult: TrimResult | null;
  /** URL de descarga resultado de la última operación de trim/gif/mp3. Null mientras espera o si no se ha solicitado. */
  trimDownloadUrl: string | null;
}
```

### New AppAction types

```typescript
| { type: "DOWNLOAD_ERROR"; message: string }
| { type: "TRIM_COMPLETE"; downloadUrl: string }
| { type: "TRIM_ERROR"; message: string }
```

`DOWNLOAD_ERROR` → transitions from `downloading` back to `home` with an error message.
`TRIM_COMPLETE` → sets `trimDownloadUrl` on the active `TrimState`.
`TRIM_ERROR` → clears `trimDownloadUrl` and surfaces error in `TrimState`.

---

## New Frontend Modules

### `front/src/lib/query-client.ts`

Singleton `QueryClient` instance shared across the app.

```typescript
// Exports: queryClient (QueryClient)
import { QueryClient } from "@tanstack/react-query";

export const queryClient = new QueryClient({
  defaultOptions: {
    queries:   { staleTime: Infinity, gcTime: 5 * 60 * 1000, retry: 1 },
    mutations: { retry: 0 },
  },
});
```

### `front/src/lib/api-client.ts`

Typed HTTP functions for all backend endpoints. Uses `fetch` directly (no TanStack Query inside — keeps it testable). Returns typed response shapes.

| Function | Method | Path |
|----------|--------|------|
| `createJob(tiktokUrl, format)` | POST | `/v1/jobs` |
| `getJob(jobId)` | GET | `/v1/jobs/:jobId` |
| `requestTrim(jobId, trimStart, trimEnd)` | POST | `/v1/jobs/:jobId/trim` |
| `requestGif(jobId, trimStart, trimEnd)` | POST | `/v1/jobs/:jobId/gif` |
| `requestMp3(jobId, trimStart?, trimEnd?)` | POST | `/v1/jobs/:jobId/mp3` |

All functions throw a typed `ApiError` with `{ code, message, httpStatus }` on non-2xx responses.

### `front/src/lib/ws-client.ts` — `useJobWebSocket` hook

| Input | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `jobId` | `string \| null` | Null disables the connection |
| `onMessage` | `(msg: WsJobMessage) => void` | Callback to handle each message |
| `timeoutMs` | `number` | Default 120_000 |

| Output | Type | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| `isConnected` | `boolean` | WS in OPEN state |
| `isConnecting` | `boolean` | WS in CONNECTING state |
| `connectionError` | `string \| null` | Non-null when WS failed or timed out |

**`WsJobMessage` union type**:
```typescript
type WsJobMessage =
  | { type: "subscribed"; jobId: string; currentStatus: JobStatus | null }
  | { type: "job_update"; jobId: string; status: JobStatus; title?: string; duration?: number;
      thumbnailUrl?: string; s3Key?: string; errorMessage?: string; updatedAt: string };
```

**`JobStatus` type** (mirrors backend `job-status.ts`):
```typescript
type JobStatus =
  | "pending" | "downloading" | "ready"
  | "trimming" | "trimmed"
  | "creating_gif" | "gif_created"
  | "creating_mp3" | "mp3_ready"
  | "error";

const TERMINAL_STATUSES = new Set(["ready","trimmed","gif_created","mp3_ready","error"]);
```

---

## Backend Data Model Changes

### Modified: `CreateJobUseCase` (cache-hit path)

Current behaviour: cache hit sets `job: null` in `CreateJobResult` and the handler returns `{ status: "ready", downloadUrl }` with no `jobId`.

New behaviour: cache hit also calls `jobRepo.save(job)` (with `status: JobStatus.ready`, `s3Key` matching the cached artifact), returns `{ hit: true, job, downloadUrl }`. The job TTL is 7 days.

**Changed files**:
- `back/src/jobs/application/create-job.usecase.ts` — save job entity on cache hit
- `back/src/handlers/api/create-job.ts` — always return `{ jobId, status, downloadUrl? }`

**New response shape for `POST /v1/jobs`** (both hit and miss paths):
```json
{ "jobId": "01HX...", "status": "ready", "downloadUrl": "https://..." }   // HTTP 200 (cache hit)
{ "jobId": "01HX...", "status": "pending" }                               // HTTP 201 (cache miss)
```

---

## DynamoDB Access Patterns (unchanged)

All existing patterns remain valid. New access pattern added by the cache-hit change:

| Pattern | Operation | Key |
|---------|-----------|-----|
| Write new ready-job on cache hit | `PutItem` | `JOB#{jobId}#METADATA` |

No new GSI or table changes required.

---

## New Dependencies — Frontend

| Package | Version | Purpose |
|---------|---------|---------|
| `@tanstack/react-query` | `^5` | HTTP mutation/query management |
| `@tanstack/react-query-devtools` | `^5` | Dev tooling (devDependency) |
| `react-use-websocket` | `^4` | WebSocket hook with reconnect + cleanup |
